title: Why senior devs flee big tech
meta_description: Senior engineers quit big tech not for money — for ownership. Measure cycle time, automate compliance, deploy to prod first. 2026 data and tools inside.
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers don’t quit Big Tech for more money.

They quit because they can’t own anything.

Here is what actually keeps them around 👇
